title: Azur [16x]
description: Azur is a 1.8.9 "plastic" themed resource pack made for pvp and mostly bedwars !
body:
Azur 16x is the first ever texture pack i have made, it is based around the default game and a plastic theme while also being fps efficient.

Azur is a pack mostly made for pvp but can also be used in other scenarios if wanted :)

It was intended to be my 50 subs pack but was never finished in time and also wasn't up to my standards at the time.

Here also are some in game screenshots to see the pack in games :)

![Azur Gamplay 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643a9960a6b2a2a2e096e041a8fb59dfbaa7da46_0.webp)

§[Azur Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f709b9ef97099465268d2d32f4e5c36c330e33b8_0.webp)

![Azur Preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137a2acc4a0267f67244c93088a810e6b929fd7f.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
